name: Albrecht Dürer
title: Artist & Printmaker
bio: German painter, printmaker, and theorist of the German Renaissance. Known for his woodcuts, engravings, and paintings including 'Praying Hands.'
faith: A devout Christian who embraced the Protestant Reformation. His famous 'Praying Hands' drawing and numerous biblical engravings reflect his deep faith. He admired Martin Luther and incorporated Reformation theology into his later works.

sources.title: Albrecht Dürer — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his embrace of the Reformation

sources.title: Praying Hands (Dürer) — Wikipedia
sources.note: His iconic drawing of hands in prayer

sources.title: Albrecht Dürer's Religious Works — The Metropolitan Museum of Art
sources.note: Overview of Dürer's religious engravings and woodcuts including 'Knight, Death and the Devil', 'Melencolia I', and his Apocalypse series — works that shaped Christian visual culture

sources.title: Dürer and the Reformation
sources.note: Dürer was an early supporter of Martin Luther — his 'Four Apostles' painting was a statement of Reformation faith given to the city of Nuremberg

tagline: Engraved Praying Hands and brought Scripture to life through art
